title: Marketplace Manager - Yatra - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Yatra - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra family as a Marketplace Manager in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra:
Yatra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
